author: samuellarson
hardware_notes: 8xH100 SXM target unless record README says otherwise
exact_command:

submission_blurb: Int6 post-training quantization enables 3x MLP expansion (21.8M params in 16MB). Combined with train@2048 + sliding window eval + FP16 tied embeddings + Late-K passthrough.
claimed_method_summary: Int6 post-training quantization enables 3x MLP expansion (21.8M params in 16MB). Combined with train@2048 + sliding window eval + FP16 tied embeddings + Late-K passthrough.
